sing.h: Four lines crossing. One moment. One market.
sing.lede: Capability going up, cost going down, agent autonomy going up, integration going down. They cross now. Everything before this point was R&D. Everything after is a market — and somebody runs it.
sing.curve_capability_p: Benchmarks doubling every 6 months, context windows by 10× per year. Last month we crossed human performance on multi-step delivery tasks that weren't on anyone's charts a year ago.
sing.curve_cost_p: Token price dropped 99% in 24 months. What cost the company $200 per answer in 2023 costs $0.04 today. A one-off research task is now a rounding error.
sing.curve_autonomy_p: Agents went from 3-step chatbots to 50-step delivery workers with tool use, memory, escalation and settlement. Persistent agents now run for days without drift.
sing.curve_integration_p: Setup cost collapsed. MCP makes any tool agent-ready. What used to be a 6-month vendor integration is a config file.
sing.hits_label: What changed · just the last 24 months
sing.hit2: 3-week sprint for a landing → one brief and 40 minutes.
sing.hit3: $3k/month SMM seat → agent fleet across 6 channels, same budget.
sing.hit4: $500 legal draft in 5 days → draft + licensed review in 2 hours.
sing.close_h: The gap between "describe" and "shipped" is dissolving.
sing.close_p: The prize is the marketplace that orchestrates this — where intent turns into a running job, settled on-chain, delivered under a human's name. That's what Golden Connect is.
